extension.title: Copilot Scheduler
config.autoShowOnStartup: Automatically open the scheduler webview on VS Code startup for this repo. Set this in the repo workspace settings if you want it enabled only here.
config.showNotifications: Show notifications when tasks are executed
config.timezone: Timezone for cron scheduling (e.g., 'Asia/Tokyo'). Leave empty for system default.
config.chatSession.new: Create new chat session for each execution
config.jitterSeconds: Default max random delay in seconds before running a task (0 = off). Each task can override this.
config.maxDailyExecutions: Maximum scheduled executions per day across all tasks (0 = unlimited, 1–100). ⚠️ Unlimited may risk API rate-limiting.
config.minimumIntervalWarning: Show a warning when a cron interval is shorter than 30 minutes
config.globalPromptsPath: Custom path for global prompt templates. Default: VS Code's User/prompts folder (Windows: %APPDATA%/Code/User/prompts, macOS: ~/Library/Application Support/Code/User/prompts, Linux: $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/Code/User/prompts or ~/.config/Code/User/prompts)
config.globalAgentsPath: Custom path for global agent files (*.agent.md). Default: VS Code's User/prompts folder (Windows: %APPDATA%/Code/User/prompts, macOS: ~/Library/Application Support/Code/User/prompts, Linux: $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/Code/User/prompts or ~/.config/Code/User/prompts)
config.reportIssue: 🐛 Found a bug? [Report an issue on GitHub](https://github.com/aktsmm/vscode-copilot-scheduler/issues)
